name: stitchbyte-lead-gen
description: Stitchbyte — Google Maps Lead Generation System

scripts.start:prod: PORT=${PORT:-5001} pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs --env production --only stitchbyte
scripts.restart:prod: PORT=${PORT:-5001} pm2 restart stitchbyte || PORT=${PORT:-5001} pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs --env production --only stitchbyte
